arts.ttl: Alexander Isak future: Newcastle striker 'makes preference clear' amid Barcelona, Arsenal, Liverpool transfer talk
arts.sum: Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak is allegedly 'very interested' in joining Liverpool at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle and Villa looking to raid top-four rivals for €50m-rated forward
arts.sum: Arsenal, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are keen on signing the Chelsea striker Nicolas Jackson at the end of the season. The former Villarreal striker has shown improvement this season and he has done reasonably well for the Blues. According to a report from Superdeporte via SportWitness, the three English clubs are hoping to secure […] The post Arsenal, Newcastle and Villa looking to raid top-four rivals for €50m-rated forward appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's smart move as Man City expose panicked email amid 'open warfare'
arts.sum: This latest legal battle comes after the tribunal ruled the previous APT regulations were 'void and unenforceable' and Newcastle's takeover proved a crucial reference point in Manchester City's argument. "I suspect that was the primary motive but there's also potentially a secondary motive when it comes to these types of actions and that is to send a warning shot out to the Premier League and its clubs that they [Manchester City] are prepared to use every avenue available, including through legal proceedings, to protect their interests and what they perceive to be the unfairness and unlawfulness of the rules.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 16 rivals rocked as Magpies' Sela deal goes under microscope
arts.sum: Newcastle United could see deals like their Sela sponsorship greatly enhanced in the future after the Premier League's Associated Party Transaction rules were declared "null and void" by a tribunal. The Premier League statement read: "This decision expressly does not impact the valid operation of the new rules.

arts.ttl: Premier League clubs refuse to back Manchester City over request for next season
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City have seen their request to start the 2025-26 campaign late due to their commitments with the FIFA Club World Cup denied

arts.ttl: Man City vs Newcastle United TV details - channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Here, Chronicle Live takes a look at the TV info needed for Newcastle's clash against Man City in the Premier League . Australia will also be broadcasting the fixture on Optus Sport, the channel which often provides the country's Premier League coverage.

arts.ttl: Merson and Sutton disagree on Man City vs Newcastle United prediction
arts.sum: Chris Sutton and Paul Merson have disagreed on who will run out winners when Newcastle United travel to the Etihad Stadium for a game against Manchester City this weekend. With two in-form teams taking to the field this Saturday, it's no wonder Sutton and Merson are conflicted about who will pick up all three points.
